item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 12min Even now, for all the wearily predictable talk of “bottle” and Arsenal “t
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 12min Even now, for all the wearily predictable talk of “bottle” and Arsenal “tears”, the Premier League title race is delicately poised.
Arsenal's loss to a rejuvenated Manchester City plunges them into a pressure cooker but the opportunity in front of them remains enormous.
Mostrar más 7 3 22 4 mil
